scripts.device:physical: DEVICE_ID="$(adb devices | awk 'NR>1 && $2=="device" && $1 !~ /^emulator-/ {print $1; exit}')"; if [ -z "$DEVICE_ID" ]; then echo 'Fiziksel cihaz bulunamadi'; exit 1; fi; echo "$DEVICE_ID"
scripts.android:clean: DEVICE_ID="$(yarn -s device:physical)" && (adb -s "$DEVICE_ID" uninstall com.yolista || true) && react-native run-android --deviceId "$DEVICE_ID"
scripts.install:release: DEVICE_ID="$(yarn -s device:physical)" && (adb -s "$DEVICE_ID" uninstall com.yolista || true) && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease && APK_PATH="$(ls app/build/outputs/apk/release/*.apk 2>/dev/null | head -1)" && if [ -z "$APK_PATH" ]; then echo 'Release APK bulunamadi'; exit 1; fi && adb -s "$DEVICE_ID" install -r "$APK_PATH" && adb -s "$DEVICE_ID" shell am start -n com.yolista/.MainActivity
scripts.install:release:clean: DEVICE_ID="$(yarn -s device:physical)" && (adb -s "$DEVICE_ID" uninstall com.yolista || true) && cd android && ./gradlew clean assembleRelease && APK_PATH="$(ls app/build/outputs/apk/release/*.apk 2>/dev/null | head -1)" && if [ -z "$APK_PATH" ]; then echo 'Release APK bulunamadi'; exit 1; fi && adb -s "$DEVICE_ID" install -r "$APK_PATH" && adb -s "$DEVICE_ID" shell am start -n com.yolista/.MainActivity
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules && rm -rf ios/Pods && rm -rf ios/build && rm -rf android/build && rm -rf android/app/build
scripts.clean:all: yarn clean && yarn install && cd ios && pod install && cd ..
scripts.reset: yarn clean && yarn install && cd ios && pod install && cd .. && yarn start --reset-cache
scripts.deep-start: rm -rf node_modules ios/Pods ios/Podfile.lock yarn.lock && yarn install && cd ios && pod install && cd .. && yarn start
scripts.deep-clean: rm -rf node_modules ios/Pods ios/Podfile.lock yarn.lock && yarn install && cd ios && pod install && cd ..
scripts.clean-unused: yarn remove @react-navigation/drawer @react-navigation/material-top-tabs react-content-loader react-native-collapsible-tab-view react-native-dropdown-picker react-native-pager-view react-native-snap-carousel react-native-tab-view supabase uuid yum
